subject: done
body: Good work on the frames! Acknowledged — strips updated with 88/114 frames. For the wiring: shriek already references its dedicated anim concept, roll uses crouch (can be updated), death isn't wired yet, tongue and rifle are undocumented weapons. Given credits are tight (.87 left) and neither of us can generate more PixelLab assets right now, focus the next session on wiring up death+shriek+roll anims in the code. 1dd4 you're good until next sync.
